generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - a small town like ours got hit by a cyber attack last month, and the only reason they recovered fast was because their local government had the right tools to track and stop it early. Our community deserves that same protection. Why should we wait until it's too late? #CommunitySafety #SecurityFirst
